do: The Ascent portal drops you here — tag the waypoint on the way through
Kill Overseer Krow at the far end
Enter Overseer's Tower
steps.layout: Maze of cages and hallways — Krow guards the tower gate at the end.

do: Turn in Return to Oriath → take the ring that patches your worst resist (Lani)
Exit to The Control Blocks
Grab the Miasmeter from the Experimental Supplies chest — spawns near the LEFT edge of the map
Kill Justicar Casticus and loot his Eyes of Zeal
Exit to Oriath Square
steps.layout: No waypoint. Miasmeter chest hugs the left edge; Casticus and the exit are in the top-right corner.
steps.tip: The Miasmeter is +1 passive on turn-in — don't skip it.

do: Tag the waypoint
LOGOUT to town (Esc → Exit to Login)
steps.layout: WP is by the central plaza. The Templar Courts door is north, across the river.

do: Turn in In Service to Science → Book of Skill, +1 passive (Vilenta)
Turn in The Key to Freedom → take the RUBY FLASK — Innocence and Kitava are both fire-heavy (Lani)
Waypoint → Oriath Square, head north over the river, open the Templar Courts door with the Eyes of Zeal
Run straight through to The Chamber of Innocence
steps.tip: You'll re-run this exact map in reverse later (as the Torched Courts) — don't clear, just move.

do: Push to the Sanctum of Innocence at the end
Kill High Templar Avarius, then Innocence manifests — heavy FIRE, keep moving and stay out of the beams
Sin appears after the kill (dialogue optional) — exit into The Torched Courts
steps.layout: Mostly linear with small side rooms.
steps.tip: Death to Purity turn-in comes later — no town trip needed yet.

do: Run back down the burning Courts — same map reversed
Exit to The Ruined Square
steps.tip: Monster level jumps to 44 here — respect the packs and skip the flame ground.

do: Tag the waypoint — the exit path leads straight to it; the Ossuary door is right beside it
Cross the river into the square and kill Utula, Stone and Steel near the fountain
Enter The Reliquary (bottom of the map): grab all 3 Kitava's Torments — Hinekora's Hair, Tukohama's Tooth, Valako's Jaw
LOGOUT to town
steps.layout: North of the river is linear. The square is south; Reliquary door at the bottom, Cathedral Rooftop up the steps on the west side.
steps.tip: Reliquary bonus: two random chests hold keys to the vault beside its waypoint — free rares if you find both.

do: Turn in Death to Purity → rare jewel (Lani)
Turn in Kitava's Torments → Book of Skill: +1 passive + 2 respec (Lani)
Turn in The King's Feast → rare weapon (Bannon)
Waypoint → The Ruined Square, take the Ossuary door next to the WP
steps.tip: No trials in Act 5. If all six Act 1–3 trials are done, Normal Lab (WP → Sarn Encampment → Aspirants' Plaza) is a fast Ascendancy grab now.

do: Run the loop to the Tomb of the First Templar at the far end and grab the Sign of Purity
Take the hidden passage by the tomb — it drops you back at the entrance
Cross the square to the steps on the west side and enter The Cathedral Rooftop
steps.layout: One big clockwise loop — the Sign is at the end of it.

do: Run the rooftop to the Cathedral Apex
Kill Kitava, the Insatiable — near-constant fire: sidestep the scythe slams, kill adds for flask charges
Board Lilly Roth's ship past the arena → sail for Act 6
steps.tip: Beating Kitava costs -30% ALL resists permanently — restock res gear before Act 6. Target: level 44–46 leaving.
